title: Laser Type and Wavelength Division Multiplexing (WDM)
title_translation: 激光器类型与波分复用（WDM）

paragraphs.source: There are two main ways to integrate lasers into CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There are two main ways to integrate lasers into CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There are two main ways to integrate lasers into CPO.

pro.text: 将激光器集成到共封装光学（Co-packaged Optics，CPO）中有两种主要方式。

paragraphs.source: The first approach, on-chip lasers, integrates the laser and modulator on the same photonic chip, typically by bonding III‑V (InP) materials onto silicon. While on-chip lasers simplify design and reduce insertion loss, there can be a few challenges:
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The first approach, on-chip lasers, integrates the laser and modulator on the same photonic chip, typically by bonding III‑V (InP) materials onto silicon. While on-chip lasers simplify design and reduce insertion loss, there can be a few challenges:
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The first approach, on-chip lasers, integrates the laser and modulator on the same photonic chip, typically by bonding III‑V (InP) materials onto silicon. While on-chip lasers simplify design and reduce insertion loss, there can be a few challenges:

pro.text: 第一种方法是片上激光器，即将激光器和调制器集成在同一块光子芯片上，通常通过将III-V族（InP）材料键合到硅上来实现。虽然片上激光器能简化设计并降低插入损耗，但也存在几项挑战：

paragraphs.source: 1. Lasers are known to be the one of the most failure prone components within the system – failures would have a high blast radius if integrated into the CPO engine as it would take down the whole chip; 2. Lasers are also sensitive to heat, placing them on a co-packaged OE would expose a laser to high heat as it would be very close to the hottest part of the system, the host silicon, which would only exacerbate the issue; 3. On-chip lasers typically struggle to deliver high enough power output.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: 1. Lasers are known to be the one of the most failure prone components within the system – failures would have a high blast radius if integrated into the CPO engine as it would take down the whole chip; 2. Lasers are also sensitive to heat, placing them on a co-packaged OE would expose a laser to high heat as it would be very close to the hottest part of the system, the host silicon, which would only exacerbate the issue; 3. On-chip lasers typically struggle to deliver high enough power output.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 1. Lasers are known to be the one of the most failure prone components within the system – failures would have a high blast radius if integrated into the CPO engine as it would take down the whole chip; 2. Lasers are also sensitive to heat, placing them on a co-packaged OE would expose a laser to high heat as it would be very close to the hottest part of the system, the host silicon, which would only exacerbate the issue; 3. On-chip lasers typically struggle to deliver high enough power output.

pro.text: 激光器是系统中故障率最高的组件之一。若集成到共封装光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）中，一旦失效将产生极大影响范围，导致整个芯片无法工作；激光器对热量也非常敏感，将其置于共封装光引擎上会使其非常接近系统中最热的部件——主机硅芯片，这只会进一步加剧问题；此外，片上激光器通常难以提供足够高的输出功率。

paragraphs.source: The one approach where the industry has come to a consensus is to use an External Light Sources (ELS). The laser is in a separate module connected to the optical engine via fiber. Often times, this laser is in a pluggable form factor like OSFP. This setup simplifies field servicing in the fairly common case of laser failures.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The one approach where the industry has come to a consensus is to use an External Light Sources (ELS). The laser is in a separate module connected to the optical engine via fiber. Often times, this laser is in a pluggable form factor like OSFP. This setup simplifies field servicing in the fairly common case of laser failures.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The one approach where the industry has come to a consensus is to use an External Light Sources (ELS). The laser is in a separate module connected to the optical engine via fiber. Often times, this laser is in a pluggable form factor like OSFP. This setup simplifies field servicing in the fairly common case of laser failures.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**
目前行业已达成共识的方案是采用外部光源（External Light Source，ELS）。激光器位于独立的模块中，通过光纤与光引擎相连。这种激光器通常采用OSFP等可插拔形式因子。该方案在激光器故障这一常见情况下，能显著简化现场维护。

paragraphs.source: The downside of the ELS is higher power consumption. As seen in the diagram below, in an ELS based system, output power is lost at multiple stages due to various factors like connector losses, fiber coupling losses and modulator inefficiencies. As such, each laser in this system must provide 24.5 dBm of optical power to compensate for losses and ensure reliable transmission. High-output lasers generate more heat and degrade faster under thermal stress, with lasers and thermo-electric coolers accounting for ~70% of ELS power consumption. While incremental improvements in laser design, packaging, and optical paths help, the issue of high power requirements of lasers has not been fully solved.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The downside of the ELS is higher power consumption. As seen in the diagram below, in an ELS based system, output power is lost at multiple stages due to various factors like connector losses, fiber coupling losses and modulator inefficiencies. As such, each laser in this system must provide 24.5 dBm of optical power to compensate for losses and ensure reliable transmission. High-output lasers generate more heat and degrade faster under thermal stress, with lasers and thermo-electric coolers accounting for ~70% of ELS power consumption. While incremental improvements in laser design, packaging, and optical paths help, the issue of high power requirements of lasers has not been fully solved.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The downside of the ELS is higher power consumption. As seen in the diagram below, in an ELS based system, output power is lost at multiple stages due to various factors like connector losses, fiber coupling losses and modulator inefficiencies. As such, each laser in this system must provide 24.5 dBm of optical power to compensate for losses and ensure reliable transmission. High-output lasers generate more heat and degrade faster under thermal stress, with lasers and thermo-electric coolers accounting for ~70% of ELS power consumption. While incremental improvements in laser design, packaging, and optical paths help, the issue of high power requirements of lasers has not been fully solved.

pro.text: 外部光源（ELS）的缺点是功耗较高。如以下图表所示，在基于ELS的系统中，输出功率会因连接器损耗、光纤耦合损耗以及调制器效率低下等因素在多个环节产生损失。因此，每个激光器需输出24.5 dBm的光功率，以补偿各类损耗并保证可靠传输。高输出激光器会产生更多热量，并在热应力下更快退化，其中激光器和热电制冷器约占ELS功耗的70%。虽然在激光器设计、封装和光路上的逐步改进有所帮助，但激光器高功率需求的问题仍未得到彻底解决。

paragraphs.source: At this year’s VLSI conference, Nvidia highlighted several laser partners within its ecosystem: Lumentum for single high-power DFBs, Ayar Labs for DFB arrays, Innolume for quantum-dot mode-locked combs, and Xscape, Enlightra, and Iloomina for pumped nonlinear resonant combs.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: At this year’s VLSI conference, Nvidia highlighted several laser partners within its ecosystem: Lumentum for single high-power DFBs, Ayar Labs for DFB arrays, Innolume for quantum-dot mode-locked combs, and Xscape, Enlightra, and Iloomina for pumped nonlinear resonant combs.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: At this year’s VLSI conference, Nvidia highlighted several laser partners within its ecosystem: Lumentum for single high-power DFBs, Ayar Labs for DFB arrays, Innolume for quantum-dot mode-locked combs, and Xscape, Enlightra, and Iloomina for pumped nonlinear resonant combs.

pro.text: 在今年的VLSI会议上，英伟达重点介绍了其生态系统内的多家激光器合作伙伴，包括提供高功率单DFB激光器的Lumentum、提供DFB阵列的Ayar Labs、提供量子点锁模梳的Innolume，以及提供泵浦非线性谐振梳的Xscape、Enlightra和Iloomina。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia has also discussed exploring VCSEL arrays as a potential alternative laser solution. While the per-fiber data rate would be lower and there may be some thermal issues, VCSELs may offer power and cost efficiency and can be suitable for “wide-and-slow” applications. That said, we don’t see this as an immediate priority for Nvidia.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Nvidia has also discussed exploring VCSEL arrays as a potential alternative laser solution. While the per-fiber data rate would be lower and there may be some thermal issues, VCSELs may offer power and cost efficiency and can be suitable for “wide-and-slow” applications. That said, we don’t see this as an immediate priority for Nvidia.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Nvidia has also discussed exploring VCSEL arrays as a potential alternative laser solution. While the per-fiber data rate would be lower and there may be some thermal issues, VCSELs may offer power and cost efficiency and can be suitable for “wide-and-slow” applications. That said, we don’t see this as an immediate priority for Nvidia.

pro.text: 英伟达还讨论了探索VCSEL阵列作为潜在替代激光器方案的可能性。虽然单光纤数据速率会较低，且可能存在一些热问题，但VCSEL阵列有望提供更好的功率和成本效率，适合“宽而慢”的应用。尽管如此，我们认为这并非英伟达目前的首要任务。

source_metadata.text: 来源：CPO 现状、挑战与解决方案

paragraphs.confirmed: 来源：CPO 现状、挑战与解决方案

paragraphs.source: Wavelength Division Multiplexing (WDM) is when multiple different wavelengths, or lambdas, of light are transmitted over the same strand of fiber. The two common variants of WDM are Coarse WDM (CWDM) and Dense WDM (DWDM). CWDM typically carries fewer channels spaced relatively far apart (typically 20 nm spacing), while DWDM packs many lanes with very tight spacing (often <1nm spacing). CWDM’s wider channel spacing limits its capacity, while DWDM’s narrower spacing can accommodate 40, 80, or even more than 100 channels. WDM is important because most implementations of CPO proposed today are limited by the number fibers that can be attached to the optical engines. Limited fiber pairs means each fiber pair must be maximized.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Wavelength Division Multiplexing (WDM) is when multiple different wavelengths, or lambdas, of light are transmitted over the same strand of fiber. The two common variants of WDM are Coarse WDM (CWDM) and Dense WDM (DWDM). CWDM typically carries fewer channels spaced relatively far apart (typically 20 nm spacing), while DWDM packs many lanes with very tight spacing (often <1nm spacing). CWDM’s wider channel spacing limits its capacity, while DWDM’s narrower spacing can accommodate 40, 80, or even more than 100 channels. WDM is important because most implementations of CPO proposed today are limited by the number fibers that can be attached to the optical engines. Limited fiber pairs means each fiber pair must be maximized.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Wavelength Division Multiplexing (WDM) is when multiple different wavelengths, or lambdas, of light are transmitted over the same strand of fiber. The two common variants of WDM are Coarse WDM (CWDM) and Dense WDM (DWDM). CWDM typically carries fewer channels spaced relatively far apart (typically 20 nm spacing), while DWDM packs many lanes with very tight spacing (often <1nm spacing). CWDM’s wider channel spacing limits its capacity, while DWDM’s narrower spacing can accommodate 40, 80, or even more than 100 channels. WDM is important because most implementations of CPO proposed today are limited by the number fibers that can be attached to the optical engines. Limited fiber pairs means each fiber pair must be maximized.

pro.text: 波分复用（Wavelength Division Multiplexing，WDM）是指在同一根光纤中传输多个不同波长（或称lambda）的光。WDM的两种常见变体是粗波分复用（CWDM）和密集波分复用（DWDM）。CWDM通常承载较少的通道，通道间距相对较大（通常为20 nm），而DWDM则以极小的间距（通常小于1 nm）集成多条通道。CWDM较宽的通道间距限制了其容量，而DWDM较窄的间距可容纳40、80甚至超过100个通道。WDM至关重要，因为目前大多数提出的共封装光学（CPO）方案都受限于可连接到光引擎的光纤数量。有限的光纤对意味着必须最大化利用每一对光纤。
